name: The Scream
description: The Scream by Edvard Munch is omnipresent. Its terror-twisted face has made such a deep and lasting impression on the collective imagination that it is even used for an emoji representing anxiety. But do you really know this iconic painting?
requirements:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10, 64bits
  • Processor: Intel Core i7-7700 or equivalent
  • Memory: 16 MB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GTX 1060 or equivalent
  • VR Support: SteamVR or Oculus PC. Standing or Room Scale
comment1: this game used to be free, now its 5$ which isn't much but its not a good price for a 10-15 minute game, Its an interesting documentary but it shouldve stayed free
comment2: This used to be free, now it isn't. And for absolutely no reason either. The experience itself is a neat little thing but it's not really worth anymore than a dollar.
comment3:
Enjoyable experience, but very short.  I am slightly disappointed, because I expected the painting to come to life more.   It  does give some background information about  Edvard Munch and about the painting.  In my opinion this could have been more then it was.  I consider to recommend this VR experience  because the content was not bad and I enjoyed the experience.  

Giving a bit more thought to this review (which was initially an up-vote)  I do believe it is too expensive.  Then I see it is listed under free to play, which it is not.  I should have been free to play.  Or at least way cheaper !  Down-voted due to  the  price vs duration.   It is expensive for what you get.   

Would be a definite recommendation if it would have been free.  There are many free experiences around which offer more content.
